title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 4–7, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I will give you the treasure, but you must retreat!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We are not as low as you think!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Of course we're going to take the treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But, we don't have to retreat!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Look at this... After I say "1, 2, Jango", you will let us pass!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's the thing he used before...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Who the heck is that girl?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain! This isn't the time to let us pass!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All the treasure on that boat belongs to me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Put it all back! Do you hear me?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How can you give away someone else's treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Ouch... you could have just told me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you talking about? I just saved you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Like I said, don't look at his pendulum!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Wasn't he running ahead of you?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
